creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, my servers have around 200 repositories, with a total size of around 10GB.
Have around 50 pipelines running per day most pipelines are running based on bots to automatically upgrade dependencies.

I have in my puma.rb:
threads 1,4
workers 2

I do not see any problems so far.

But I added a note to the upgrade manual (the installation manual has already this note). Hopefully this helps someone else.
I also added this to the errata section in the installation manual.
